_usage: This config is designed to work with command-line flags in Makefile. Use: gosec -conf .gosec.json ./...

_exclude_explanations.G103: Audit the use of unsafe block - legitimate use in performance-critical code
_exclude_explanations.G115: Integer overflow conversion - too many false positives in safe conversions
_exclude_explanations.G404: Use of weak random number generator - acceptable for non-cryptographic use

_notes: Severity: medium+ filters out low-severity issues
Excluded directories contain test fixtures and documentation
